reviews.comment:
La atención buena. Pero el bar/, café a las 7.30 estaba cerrado, me quedé con ganas de un chocolate.

(Translated by Google)
The service was good. But the bar/coffee shop was closed at 7:30; I was really looking forward to a hot chocolate.

reviews.comment:

Very useful. It's a shame it hasn't had a bar for about 3 years now.

reviews.comment:
La nafta, buena en general. Pero en medios de pago, no hacen factura A si pagas con QR con la app. Debes pagar con débito o efectivo para recibir factura.

(Translated by Google)
Gasoline is generally good. But when it comes to payment methods, they don't issue an A-voice if you pay with a QR code using the app. You must pay with debit or cash to receive an invoice.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/16851497882005814309/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNPdmVuSTFBRRAB

reviews.comment:
Fui a ACA a hacer el trámite de certificado de licencia internacional y me atendieron excelentemente, tanto por teléfono como en persona. Muchas gracias a todo el staff por la velocidad de resolución y la buena onda :)

(Translated by Google)
I went to ACA to process my international driving license certificate and they treated me excellently, both on the phone and in person. Many thanks to the entire staff for their quick service and friendly attitude :)
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/16851497882005814309/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNPcmF6VUpREAE

reviews.comment:
No puede ser que en hora pico con una cola de autos interminable los playeros pierdan tiempo limpiando vidrios.

(Translated by Google)
It's unacceptable that during rush hour, with an endless line of cars, the beach attendants waste time cleaning windshields.
